verses.text: A zingsang ciangin siampi liante in upate, Thukham hilh siate, leh ulian dang khempeuh tawh thu kikupna khat nei uh a, Jesuh a henkhit uh ciangin paikhiatpihin Pilat tungah a ap uh hi
Pilat in, “Nang, Jew mite' Kumpipa na hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin Jesuh in, “Nang zong tua mah nong ci hi,” ci-in a dawng hi
Siampi liante in Jesuh a mawhsakna tampi gen uh ahih manin
Pilat in Jesuh kiangah, “Na dawn'na ding omlo ahi hiam? Nang hong mawhsakna thute na zazo hi,” a ci hi
Ahi zongin Jesuh in amah a kimawhsaknate kamkhat beek dawng hetlo ahih manin Pilat in lamdang a sa mahmah hi.

sections.sectionTitle: Jesuh a Si dingin Thu Kikhen

verses.text: Paisan Pawi hun simin mite in Pilat tungah a nget peuhpeuh mi khat, thong panin a khah a ngeina ahi hi
Kumpi a lehdo laitakun mi a that, thong sunga kikhumte lakah Barabbas a kici mi khat zong kihel hi
Pilat kiangah mihonte hong paito uh a, hih bang hun pawlin a hih ngei bangin mi khat a khahna ding a hong ngen uh hi
Pilat in amaute kiangah, “Jew mite' Kumpipa ka khah ding hong deih na hi uh hiam?” ci-in a dong hi
Bang hang hiam cih leh siampite in Jesuh a hazatna hangin hih bangin ama kiangah a paipihna thu teltakin a thei hi
Ahi zongin Barabbas hong khahsak zaw in, ci-in mihonte in a ngetna dingun siampite in mihonte a hanthawn uh hi
Tua ciangin Pilat in mihonte tungah, “Jew mite' Kumpipa na cihpa uh bangcih ding ka hi hiam?” ci-in a dot ciangin
amaute in, “Singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a awng uh hi
Tua ciangin Pilat in, “Bang hangin tua ci na hi uh hiam? Bang siatna bawl ahi hiam?” a cih ciangin, “Singlamteh tungah that in,” ci-in a kinakko zaw semsem uh hi
Pilat in mihonte lungkimsak nuam ahih manin Barabbas khah a, Jesuh a satsak khit ciangin singlamteh tungah thahdingin galkapte' khutsungah a ap hi.
Tua ciangin galkapte in gam ukpa' inntualah Jesuh paipih uh a, galkap dang khempeuh zong kikhawmsak uh hi
Jesuh, puansan silhsak uh a, ling lukhu bawlin a lu tungah a khusak uh hi
A zahtakbawl bang keekin hopih uh a, “Jew mite' Kumpipa aw, na khan' sau ta hen!” a ci uh hi
Tua ciangin pumpeng tawh a lu satin cilphih uh a, a zahtakbawl kineihin a mai-ah a kun uh hi
Tua bangin a simmawhbawl khit uh ciangin a puansan suahkhiatsak uh a, ama puan ngeite a silhsak kik uh hi. Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah thahdingin a paikhiatpih uh hi.
Tua bangin a pai laitakun, Alexander leh Rufas' pa, Sairin khuami Simon a kici mi khat, gamsung panin khuapi sunga hong pai tawh kituak uh a, Jesuh' singlamteh a pua dingin lammat uh hi
Lutang guh a cihnopna Golgotha munah paipih uh a
tua lai-ah myrrh a kici zatui a sawhsa uh leenggahzu pia uh a, ahi zongin Jesuh in ne nuamlo hi
Tua ciangin singlamteh tungah amah khai uh a, a puante kua in a koi ngah ding cih a theihna dingun suang lawn'in ai san uh a, amauteng in a puante a hawm uh hi
Jesuh, singlamteh tungah a khai hun pen zingsang nai kua laitak ahi hi
“Jew mite' Kumpipa,” ci-in amah a mawhsakna uh lai kigelh hi
A taklamah khat, a veilamah khat, mi thatte nih tawh a kikhai khawm hi
(Hih bangin a hihna uh tawh, “Khialhna a nei mite tawh kisim khawm hi,” ci-in Lai Siangtho sungah a kigelh thu a tung ahi hi
Amah a va mukha mi peuhpeuh in a lu uh singin zahpihbawl uh a, “A! Biakinn susia-in ni thum sungin a lamkik dingpa
Singlamteh tung panin hong kumsuk in la, nangmah kihonkhia tawm in!” a ci uh hi
Tua bangmahin siampi liante leh Thukham hilh siate in zong zahpih bawlin, “Midangte honkhiazo napi, amah leh amah kihonkhia zolo
Israel mite' kumpipa Khrih tu-in singlamteh tung panin hong kumsuk leh amah um ni!” a kici uh hi. Jesuh tawh a kikhai khawm mi nihte in zong a simmawhbawl uh hi.
Tua ciangin sunkim nai sawmlenih laitaka kipanin nai thum sung leitung khempeuhah khim a zing hi
Nitak nai thum laitakin Jesuh nakpi takin kiko a, “Ka Pasian, ka Pasian aw, bang hangin kei hong nusia na hi hiam?” a cihna ahi, “Eloi, Eloi, lama sabakthani?” a ci hi
Tua a kikona a zak uh ciangin tua lai-a om mi pawlkhatte in, “Elijah a sam hi,” a ci uh hi

Tua laitakin mi khat va tai a, leenggahzu-hau sungah tuihupna diahin pumpeeng dawnah a henkhit ciangin Jesuh' hup dingin tahto a, “Khawl dih un, singlamteh tung panin a sutkhia dingin Elijah hong pai hiam, en dih ni,” a ci hi
Tua ciangin nakpi takin Jesuh kiko-in a laitat hi
Biakinn sunga kidalna puan a tung lam pan a taw dongin kikekin phelnih a kisuah hi
Jesuh' mai-ah a ding galkapmangpa in tua bangin kiko-in a laitah a muh ciangin, “Hihpa, Pasian' ta taktak ahi hi,” a ci hi
Jesuh a gal et numei pawlkhat zong a om hi. Tuate lakah Magdala khuami Mary, a nauzaw James leh Josef' nu Mary, leh Salome ahi uh hi
Galilee gamsungah Jesuh a om lai-in hih numeite in Jesuh zui-in a huh uh hi. Jerusalem ciangdong Jesuh a hong zui numei dang tampi zong a om hi.
Tua ni pen Sabbath ni ma, Kigin' ni ahih manin nitak lam ciangin
mite in a zahtak, ulian vaihawmte lakah a kihel, Pasian' Uk ding hun zong a lamen, Arimathea khuami Josef, hangtakin Pilat kiangah hong pai-in Jesuh' luang a hong ngen hi
Pilat in a lungsimah, Jesuh a si khin takpi mah hi ding ahi hiam, ci-in ngaihsun ahih manin galkapmangpa samsak a, si khinta ahi hiam, ci-in a dong hi
Galkapmangpa' genna panin a sihkhitna thu a theih ciangin a luang a laktheihna dingin Josef tungah thu a pia hi

Josef in zong puanpak lei a, singlamteh tung panin Jesuh' luang lakhia-in, a puan lei tawh hoihtakin vialin tuam a, tawhsa-in a om suang han sungah a sial hi. Tua ciangin suangtum khat hualin a kongvang a hu hi
Magdala khuami Mary leh Josef' nu Mary in, Jesuh a kivuina mun a thei uh hi.
